name: Caramel Apple Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, and melted butter. Press mixture onto the sides and bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Unwrap caramels; place in a 2-quart heavy saucepan. Add evaporated milk. Melt caramels over low heat, stirring until smooth. Reserve half of the melted caramel mixture.
4. Pour remaining caramel mixture over crust in pan. Sprinkle half of the chopped pecans over caramel in crust.
5. Beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar together until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating until smooth after each addition.
6. Toss 1 cup chopped apples, flour, and cinnamon together. Fold into the cream cheese mixture.
7. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the caramel crust.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Combine reserved caramel and remaining chopped apples. Spread over cheesecake, sprinkle with remaining pecans.
10. Continue baking for 15 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan. Chill before serving.
